app.subtitle: Agent-driven Research Creation Experience
app.exploreMore: 🚀 Explore more AI data processing tools

navTooltip.home: See all workflows, preview examples, and jump straight into the right tool from a single landing page
navTooltip.paper2figure: Generate research figures from papers, including model architecture diagrams, technical roadmaps, and experimental data charts in editable PPTX format
navTooltip.imagePlayground: Directly test backend-managed image models with prompt-driven generation for rapid research-visual exploration
navTooltip.mindmap: Upload papers, lecture notes, or paste raw text to generate a standalone tree-structured mind map, then keep refining nodes and branches inside the same page
navTooltip.paper2drawio: Convert images to editable DrawIO diagrams, supporting flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and more
navTooltip.paper2ppt: Upload paper PDFs or enter topics, AI intelligently analyzes content and generates beautiful academic presentation slides
navTooltip.pdf2ppt: Quickly convert any PDF document to editable PPTX format while preserving original layout and content structure
navTooltip.image2ppt: Upload images or screenshots, automatically recognize content and convert to editable PPT
navTooltip.image2drawio: Upload any image and convert it to an editable DrawIO diagram
navTooltip.ppt2polish: AI-powered PPT polishing to optimize layout, beautify design, and refine content
navTooltip.knowledge: Manage and search your document knowledge base with intelligent Q&A capabilities
navTooltip.files: View and manage all files generated by workflows, with download and delete operations
navTooltip.paper2rebuttal: AI-assisted academic paper rebuttal letter generator, automatically analyzes reviewer comments and provides response strategies
navTooltip.paper2video: Convert paper PDF to presentation video with optional digital human and voice; AI generates script per page then synthesizes video
navTooltip.paper2poster: Convert a paper PDF into an academic poster with automatic content extraction, layout, color design, and export
navTooltip.paper2citation: Search authors or paper DOIs/URLs to inspect citation networks, citing institutions, and citation-oriented author details

navSubTooltip.paper2figureTechExp: Generate technical route and experiment charts from PDF/text with templates, export PPT/SVG
navSubTooltip.paper2drawioAi: Text-to-DrawIO flow/architecture diagrams, edit online and export PNG/SVG/DrawIO
navSubTooltip.paper2figureModelDrawio: Generate a model diagram, refine prompts, then edit in DrawIO or export PPT/PNG/SVG
navSubTooltip.paper2pptImage: Generate a visual academic deck with image-based slides from a paper PDF or topic
navSubTooltip.paper2pptFrontend: Generate editable 16:9 HTML/CSS slides with per-page review, repair, and screenshot export

home.title: One entrance for every Paper2Any workflow
home.description: Use the landing page to understand what each tool does before you jump into the corresponding workflow. Tools with reference images show live previews; the rest use premium placeholders for now.

creation.title: Generate directly from paper content
creation.description: Best when you start from a paper PDF, raw manuscript text, or a topic and want figures, slides, videos, or posters.

conversion.title: Refine material you already have
conversion.description: Best when you already have PDFs, images, or PPTs and want editable output or a stronger visual polish.

research.title: Track, respond, and manage research assets
research.description: Best for citation analysis, rebuttal drafting, knowledge base workflows, and revisiting generated artifacts.

paper2figureTechExp.title: Tech Route / Experiment Figure Generator
paper2figureTechExp.description: Extract methods, comparisons, and core modules from a paper PDF or manuscript text and turn them into research-style figures.

paper2ppt.title: Paper to Academic Deck
paper2ppt.description: Break down paper structure, surface the narrative, and generate editable slides for seminars, lab meetings, or defense prep.

paper2pptImage.title: Image-style PPT Generation
paper2pptImage.description: Use the visual-slide route to generate image-first academic pages with stronger layout atmosphere and presentation polish.

paper2pptFrontend.title: Editable PPT Generation
paper2pptFrontend.description: Generate editable 16:9 HTML/CSS slides with inline text editing, per-page visual QA, and screenshot export to PPTX / PDF.

paper2video.title: Paper / PPT to Narrated Video
paper2video.description: Generate per-slide scripts and voiceover, with optional digital human presentation, for teaching and outreach.

paper2figureModel.title: Model Diagram Generator
paper2figureModel.description: Create more structured model architecture diagrams focused on modules and relations, then keep editing or export them.

paper2drawioAi.title: Flow / Architecture Diagram Generator
paper2drawioAi.description: Turn paper paragraphs or text instructions into editable DrawIO flowcharts and system diagrams.

mindmap.title: Standalone Mind Map Workspace
mindmap.description: Extract structure from documents or raw text, generate Mermaid mind maps, and keep editing and saving the source inside one dedicated page.

paper2poster.title: Paper to Poster
paper2poster.description: Summarize content, organize layout, and build a conference-poster style visual automatically.

pdf2ppt.title: PDF to Editable PPT
pdf2ppt.description: Convert an existing PDF document or deck into editable PPTX while preserving structure and layout as much as possible.

image2ppt.title: Image to Slide
image2ppt.description: Convert screenshots, posters, or visual mockups into editable slides so you can continue refining them.

image2drawio.title: Image to DrawIO
image2drawio.description: Turn whiteboard sketches, flowcharts, or architecture screenshots into editable DrawIO assets.

ppt2polish.title: PPT Polish
ppt2polish.description: Clean up layout, strengthen hierarchy, and improve visual quality before the final delivery stage.

paper2citation.title: Citation Tracker
paper2citation.description: Trace citation networks from author names, DOIs, or paper URLs and inspect institutions, scholars, and citation patterns.

paper2rebuttal.title: Rebuttal Drafting
paper2rebuttal.description: Analyze reviewer comments and structure response strategy and final rebuttal text for revision cycles.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base Workspace
knowledge.description: Store documents in a reusable knowledge base for Q&A, retrieval, synthesis, and downstream generation.

files.title: History Files Hub
files.description: Revisit all generated outputs, download them again, and continue work without losing previous artifacts.

empty.title: No files yet
empty.desc: Files generated by workflows will appear here

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{fileName}}"?
